contract_summary: Acquires a reference on the current namespace (struct aa_ns) by first taking a reference on the current label via a critical section, extracting the namespace, and then taking a reference on it. The caller receives a pointer to the namespace with an incremented reference count and must later release it by calling aa_put_ns(). This is a standard get-wrapper for the current namespace.
